title: carum visnaga
intro: Carum visnaga, also known as Khella, is a perennial herb plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. The health benefits of Carum visnaga include relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and alleviate anxiety. Carum visnaga can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief from respiratory issues.
